reference: IF IT HAD NOT BEEN FOR TWO THINGS I FEAR SHE NEVER WOULD HAVE STOOD A SUMMER IN TOWN BUT SYDNEY OFTEN CALLED TILL HIS VACATION CAME AND A VOLUMINOUS CORRESPONDENCE WITH POLLY BEGUILED THE LONG DAYS
text: if it had not been for two things i fear she never would have stood a summer in town but sidney often called till his vacation came and a voluminous correspondence with polly beguiled the long days
